subject: Create EventBuffer GenServer
description: ETS-backed event buffer for non-blocking event ingest

subject: Wire EventController to EventBuffer
description: Replace Ash.create with EventBuffer.ingest

subject: Build rich agent cards with live activity
description: Per-agent live activity stream, tmux grouping, inline controls

subject: Implement targeted + broadcast messaging
description: Command bar with agent/team/all targeting

subject: Add session launcher from UI
description: Launch claude in new tmux session from Observatory

subject: Wire pipeline task view to all teams
description: Show task pipelines across all active teams

subject: Add HITL controls to agent cards
description: Approve/reject/rewrite actions inline per agent
notes: HITL controls wired: pause/resume through HITLRelay, buffer viewer in detail panel, approve/reject buttons, PAUSED badge in fleet tree. Added buffered_messages/1, paused_sessions/0, reject/3 to HITLRelay.

subject: Non-blocking event pipeline validation
description: Load test hook events, verify no SQLite blocking

subject: Ash domain modeling refactor
description: Create Fleet and Activity Ash domains with resources backed by Ash.DataLayer.Simple. Extract prepare_assigns into DashboardState using Ash code interfaces.
notes: Steps 7-9: imported SessionControlHandlers+TmuxHandlers, extracted DashboardTmuxHandlers module (95 lines out), simplified apply/3 calls. DashboardAgentHealthHelpers layering inversion noted but all helpers still actively used. Clean compile.

subject: Register operator as permanent agent + rename dashboard to operator
description: AgentRegistry init registers operator agent. All from labels changed from dashboard to operator. PubSub subscription updated.

subject: Fix LoadMessages + detail panel + empty guards
description: Activity.Message now includes Mailbox ETS messages. Detail panel form uses dynamic ID. Empty content/target guards added.

subject: Merge /fleet and /protocols into single Fleet view
description: 3-column layout: fleet tree (360px, tree-line hierarchy) | comms timeline (flex, mailbox messages) | detail panel (400px, chain of command). Remove /protocols nav.

subject: Add fleet tree + comms helpers to command_components.ex
Add new assigns and events to dashboard_live.ex
Add project name above teams in fleet tree
Build and verify zero warnings
notes: mix compile --warnings-as-errors passes clean

subject: Extract FleetHelpers module
description: Pure functions for fleet tree: role classification, hierarchy, chain of command, project grouping

subject: Fix command bar select frozen in phx-update=ignore
description: Select was inside phx-update=ignore div, never updated with new agents. Moved select outside, only text input wrapped.

subject: Document messaging architecture
description: Map all 5 message flow paths, PubSub topics, bypass routes, unification opportunities

subject: Unify all messaging through Gateway Router
description: Route EventController direct Mailbox calls and SessionControl direct CommandQueue calls through Gateway.Router.broadcast for consistent audit trail
notes: EventController handle_send_message now routes through Gateway.Router.broadcast. Debug endpoints added. Tmux pane delivery wired. Qualified agent naming. Stale sweep.

subject: Tmux multi-panel integration
description: User wants multi-tmux view with option to have multiple tmuxes open, not just single Tmux button
notes: Multi-panel tmux: tabbed + tiled layout. tmux_panels list, tmux_outputs map, tmux_layout toggle. Heartbeat refreshes all open sessions. Tab bar with session pills, Close Tab/All, Kill, Tile/Tabs toggle.

subject: Remove AccessStruct macro from all Ash resources
description: AccessStruct fetch/2 stripped by Ash before_compile hooks causing runtime UndefinedFunctionError. Removed from 5 resources, converted ~25 bracket access sites to dot access across 10+ files.

subject: Fix dropdown stability + message delivery fallback
description: Wrapped selects in phx-update=ignore. Added Operator.send fallback to direct Mailbox when Gateway returns 0 recipients. Fixed ProtocolTracker timeout (removed N+1 stats). Removed all polling.

subject: Create Heartbeat GenServer with Gateway integration
description: Observatory.Heartbeat publishes to PubSub heartbeat + Gateway fleet:heartbeat every 5s. Added to MonitorSupervisor. ProtocolTracker and LiveView subscribe to heartbeat instead of own timers.

subject: Fix layering inversion + extract dashboard handlers + wire feed view
description: Created Fleet.AgentHealth domain module (79 lines). Extracted DashboardPhase5Handlers (104 lines) and DashboardSlideoutHandlers (125 lines). Consolidated mount into DashboardState.default_assigns/1. dashboard_live.ex 887->458 lines. Wired FeedComponents.feed_view into command_view via Comms/Feed tab toggle.

subject: Conversation tracing (agent pair filter)
description: Filter comms by agent pair. Click Trace on agent in detail panel to filter. Click second agent to narrow to pair conversation. Violet pills in comms tab bar. Max 2 agents; clicking 3rd replaces.

subject: Cost dashboard UI
description: Add Costs tab to fleet control view showing token usage by model and agent from SQLite TokenUsage table

subject: Progressive agent nudging
description: NudgeEscalator GenServer with 4-level escalation (warn/nudge/pause/zombie) for stale agents

subject: Agent spawning via Operator
description: AgentSpawner creates tmux sessions with claude, writes overlay + hooks. Operator.spawn_agent/stop_agent public API

subject: Quality gate enforcement
description: QualityGate GenServer listens for TaskCompleted events, runs done_when command, nudges agent on failure

subject: Instruction overlays for spawned agents
description: InstructionOverlay.generate/1 creates per-agent CLAUDE.md with role/task/scope/gates/comms protocol

subject: Channel registry in Router
description: Replace hardcoded channel dispatch with runtime config. Channel behaviour gets channel_key/0 and optional skip?/1. Router iterates config :observatory, :channels list. All 3 adapters updated.

subject: PaneMonitor GenServer
description: Capture tmux pane output on heartbeat, parse OBSERVATORY_DONE/BLOCKED signals, broadcast on pane:signals topic. Makes hookless agents observable.

subject: Host + tree fields in AgentRegistry
description: Added host (default local), parent_id, children to agent entry. Foundation for distributed agents and flexible hierarchy.

subject: SSH tmux channel adapter
description: SshTmux channel adapter wrapping tmux commands in ssh user@host. Enables remote agent management.
notes: SshTmux adapter with session@host addressing, BatchMode ssh, configurable socket/timeout. PaneMonitor captures from both local and remote.

subject: Agent tree tracking in spawn chain
description: Track parent_id/children on spawn. Scoped authority. Flexible hierarchy for master-coord->coord->lead->specialist patterns.
notes: Tree API: register_spawned/2, children/1, parent/1, chain_of_command/1, reparent/2. qualify_agent_id/3 for disambiguation. Roles NOT hardcoded (team builder coming).

subject: Rename codebase from Observatory to ICHOR IV
description: Incremental rename: module names, config, branding, tmux socket path. Not a big-bang rename.
notes: Full rename: Observatory->Ichor, ObservatoryWeb->IchorWeb, :observatory->:ichor. 211 modules. Dashboard title ICHOR IV. Project folder unchanged.

subject: Write ADRs for BEAM-native agent architecture
description: ADR-023 (agent processes), ADR-024 (team supervision), ADR-025 (native messaging)

subject: Build BEAM-native fleet foundation
description: AgentProcess GenServer, TeamSupervisor DynamicSupervisor, FleetSupervisor, two Registry instances wired into application.ex

subject: Wire Operator.send to AgentProcess
description: When an AgentProcess exists for target, deliver via GenServer.cast instead of Gateway.Router.broadcast
notes: Operator.send tries AgentProcess first via try_native_delivery, falls back to Gateway.Router

subject: Wire AgentSpawner to FleetSupervisor
description: spawn_agent/1 should use FleetSupervisor.spawn_agent instead of raw tmux commands
notes: AgentSpawner creates AgentProcess under FleetSupervisor (standalone) or TeamSupervisor (team member). stop_agent terminates BEAM process + sends /exit to tmux.

subject: Update LoadAgents/LoadTeams to read from Registry
description: Preparations read from Fleet.ProcessRegistry and Fleet.TeamRegistry alongside EventBuffer/TeamWatcher
notes: LoadAgents.merge_beam_processes adds process-only agents, corrects ended status. LoadTeams.merge_with_beam_teams adds BEAM-supervised teams.

subject: MCP check_inbox via AgentProcess.get_unread
description: Replace Mailbox ETS read with AgentProcess.get_unread for process-backed agents
notes: check_inbox reads from AgentProcess.get_unread first, merges with Mailbox. send_message tries AgentProcess.send_message before Gateway.Router.

subject: Eliminate CommandQueue filesystem
description: Remove disk-based inbox once all agents use AgentProcess
notes: Superseded by task 51 -- legacy modules already eliminated

subject: Eliminate TeamWatcher disk polling
description: Remove TeamWatcher once all teams use TeamSupervisor
notes: Superseded by task 51 -- legacy modules already eliminated

subject: Eliminate Mailbox ETS
description: Remove Mailbox GenServer once all messages route through AgentProcess
notes: Superseded by task 51 -- legacy modules already eliminated

subject: Elixir style guide refactor of BEAM-native modules
description: Split AgentProcess (302->229 lines), extracted Delivery module (76 lines), added @doc/@spec/@type to all functions, pattern matching on all function heads, fixed backend_from_channels cond->pattern match, fixed Team :source constraint

subject: Ash Fleet domain generic actions + code interfaces
description: Add generic actions to Fleet.Agent (:spawn, :pause, :resume, :terminate, :send_message) and Fleet.Team (:create_team, :disband, :spawn_member) that delegate to GenServer layer. Add code interfaces. Rewire AgentTools.Inbox to use Fleet code interfaces.
notes: Phase 1 complete. All external callers rewired to Fleet code interfaces. Remaining legacy refs are internal to modules targeted by Phase 2 (task 51).

subject: Workshop Ash domain + blueprint UI
description: Created Workshop Ash domain with 4 SQLite-backed resources (TeamBlueprint, AgentBlueprint, SpawnLink, CommRule). manage_relationship(:direct_control) for nested CRUD. Auto-save on every canvas mutation. Saved Blueprints panel in right sidebar with save/load/delete. Blueprints loaded on workshop nav entry.

subject: Ash-disciplined refactor: phases 1-5, 7
description: Deleted dead code from DashboardDataHelpers/TeamHelpers/SessionHelpers. Canonicalized role classification via AgentRegistry.derive_role/1. Unified agent index through Fleet.Agent attributes + LoadAgents merge_with_registry. Extracted sessions/inspector/topology to Fleet.Queries. Created Activity.EventAnalysis for tool_analytics/timeline. Fixed template layer violations (paused_sessions + mailbox_messages as assigns). Net -730 lines from web layer.

subject: Phase 6: EventController business logic extraction
description: Extracted all business logic from EventController (277->66 lines). sanitize_payload + tool duration tracking -> EventBuffer. estimate_cost_cents + maybe_record_token_usage -> Costs.CostAggregator.record_usage/2. handle_channel_events + handle_pre_tool_use + handle_send_message + ensure_team_supervisor -> Gateway.Router.ingest/1. Controller is now a thin HTTP adapter.

subject: Workshop module split + idiomatic polish
description: Split dashboard_workshop_handlers.ex (637->198 lines) into 4 focused modules: Handlers (canvas CRUD), Persistence (blueprint events + auto-save + Ash mapping), Presets (declarative @presets map + spawn_order), Types (AgentType CRUD). Added AgentType Ash resource with sorted!() code interface. Updated DashboardLive routing: specific events before ws_ catch-all. Removed placeholder comm rule buttons. Cleaned naming redundancies.

subject: Create Archon domain + refactor AgentTools
description: Created Observatory.Archon parent domain and Observatory.Archon.Tools AshAi subdomain with 7 fleet/comms/system tools across 4 focused resources. Refactored AgentTools from 2 bloated files (726 lines) into 7 focused resources (498 lines). Fixed NudgeEscalator to skip operator agent. Killed rogue scheduled task.

subject: Remove dead tree code from AgentRegistry
description: Remove children/parent/chain_of_command/reparent/add_child/remove_child/build_chain. Zero external callers.
notes: AgentRegistry 894->669 lines

subject: Distribution foundation: HostRegistry + :pg groups + remote spawning
description: HostRegistry GenServer for BEAM node tracking. AgentProcess/TeamSupervisor join :pg groups. FleetSupervisor.spawn_agent_on/2. AgentSpawner :host option.
notes: Foundation complete. Remaining: clustering config, remote tmux delivery, AgentSpawner refactor.

subject: Archon Memories integration + Memories bugfixes
description: Fixed 5 bugs in Memories project (reranker dispatch, SearchVector single-table, missing entity/fact embeddings, no result hydration, group_id resolution). Created MemoriesClient HTTP client and Memory tools resource (search_memory, remember, query_memory) for Archon. Verified end-to-end: ingest -> digest -> embed -> search with hydrated results.
notes: Memories server must run on port 4000. Archon group_id: 0f8eae17-15fc-5af1-8761-0093dc9b5027

subject: Add space attribute to Memories resources
description: Hierarchical namespace (space) on Episode, Entity, Fact. Propagated through DigestEpisode pipeline, VectorChord SQL filter, search pipeline.
notes: Regex validated, default general, colon-separated

subject: Align episode type/source enums to Zep
description: type = structural (text/message/json), source = provenance (user/agent/system/document/api). Data migration for existing records.
notes: Defaults: type text, source api

subject: Archon LLM wiring
description: Connect Archon to Claude API with AshAi tools. Archon.Tools domain has 10 tools ready.

subject: Archon chat UI
description: Dashboard drawer/panel for conversing with Archon
notes: UI overlay + chat + dispatch/3 refactor (594->164 lines)

subject: Fix :pg child spec + HostRegistry scope + Ash domain config
description: Fixed 3 root causes: (1) :pg child spec in application.ex needed explicit map (Erlang module), (2) HostRegistry used :pg.join/2 (default scope) instead of :pg.join/3 with :observatory_agents, (3) Observatory.Archon + Archon.Tools missing from ash_domains config.
notes: All 3 were integration gaps from distribution foundation + Archon work done in parallel sessions

subject: Rewire Archon.Tools to Fleet code interfaces
description: Replace direct AgentRegistry.list_all() and TeamWatcher.get_state() calls with Fleet.Agent and Fleet.Team code interfaces. Archon.Tools.Agents -> Fleet.Agent.all!(), Archon.Tools.Teams -> Fleet.Team.alive!(), Archon.Tools.System -> Fleet reads for agent/team counts.
notes: Rewired 4 Archon.Tools modules: Agents->Fleet.Agent, Teams->Fleet.Team, System->Fleet reads, Messages->Activity.Message

subject: Rewire AgentTools.Inbox to Fleet code interfaces
description: Replace direct AgentProcess/Mailbox calls in check_inbox and acknowledge_message with Fleet code interfaces. send_message already uses Fleet.Agent.send_message.
notes: Added get_unread/mark_read to Fleet.Agent. AgentTools.Inbox now routes through Fleet code interfaces. Removed cleanup_command_queue.

subject: Rewire DashboardSessionControlHandlers to Operator.send
description: Replace CommandQueue.write_command + Mailbox.send_message with Operator.send for pause/resume/shutdown. Session control commands should flow through the unified messaging pipeline.
notes: Replaced CommandQueue.write_command + Mailbox.send_message with Operator.send in pause/resume/shutdown handlers

subject: Rewire dashboard message reads to Activity/Fleet
description: Replace Mailbox.all_messages and Mailbox.unread_count in DashboardState and DashboardMessagingHandlers with Activity.Message reads or AgentProcess queries.
notes: DashboardState uses Activity.Message.recent. refresh_mailbox_assigns simplified.

subject: Rewire DebugController to Fleet code interfaces
description: Update health checks: team_watcher check -> Fleet.Team, mailbox check -> AgentProcess stats, registry check stays (it IS the gateway layer).
notes: DebugController: team check uses Fleet.Team, mailbox check uses AgentProcess.list_all, mailboxes endpoint uses Activity.Message. DashboardLive.mount no longer calls TeamWatcher.

subject: Eliminate legacy modules (Mailbox, CommandQueue, TeamWatcher)
description: Phase 2: After all callers rewired to Fleet interfaces, remove Mailbox/CommandQueue/TeamWatcher from CoreSupervisor and delete modules. Rewire MailboxAdapter to deliver via AgentProcess. Update LoadTeams/LoadMessages to not need legacy modules. Claude-specific disk scanning (TeamWatcher ~/.claude/teams/) deferred.
notes: Phase 2 complete. Mailbox, CommandQueue, TeamWatcher deleted. MailboxAdapter rewired to AgentProcess. LoadMessages/LoadTeams simplified. Zero references remaining.

subject: Agent lifecycle management closed-loop
description: Fixed 6 lifecycle gaps: AgentProcess.terminate/2 as single cleanup point (tmux+registry+eventbuffer), SessionEnd terminates BEAM process, Sweep does full cleanup, AgentSpawner.stop_agent cleans registry. Ghost detection UI with GHOST badges. Standalone agents grouped by project. Sweep rewritten in idiomatic Elixir. Debug endpoint enhanced with source tracing.
notes: 6 gaps closed. Ghost detection via event_count==0. Operator hidden. Infrastructure tmux filtered. Shutdown clears selected_command_agent for instant UI.

subject: Fix subagent hierarchy in fleet panel
description: Rewrote build_subagent_map to use PreToolUse/PostToolUse Agent/Task events instead of SubagentStart. Rich metadata: description, subagent_type, name. Subagents are metadata on parent, not separate Fleet.Agent entries.

subject: Make subagents clickable in fleet tree
description: Added phx-click=select_subagent on subagent rows, detail panel with type/parent/description/tool_use_id/started_at. Handler in DashboardSwarmHandlers.

subject: Fix NudgeEscalator auto-pausing
description: Increased thresholds (600s stale, 300s nudge). Auto-unpause on activity resume (HITLRelay.unpause when level>=2). Non-tmux agents capped at level 0. Added /api/debug/hitl-clear endpoint.

subject: Build spawn_agent/stop_agent MCP tools
description: Ichor.AgentTools.Spawn resource with spawn_agent (8 params: prompt, capability, model, name, team_name, cwd, file_scope, extra_instructions) and stop_agent actions. Registered in domain and MCP router.

subject: Idle vs zombie visual distinction
description: User wants clear visual differentiation between idle (waiting for input) and zombie (truly dead) agents in fleet panel. Fleet.Agent status has [:active, :idle, :ended] -- may need :zombie status or visual treatment.

subject: Live test spawn_agent MCP tool
description: Tool is registered and verified via tools/list but no live spawn test performed. Test from actual Claude Code MCP client.

subject: Fix agent identity: UUID-aware short_id, canonical tmux session_id, no Path.basename naming
description: Fixed 3 root causes: (1) short_id blind 8-char truncation -> UUID-aware via binary pattern match, (2) agent name from Path.basename(cwd) -> tmux session name or short UUID, (3) EventBuffer resolve_session_id race condition -> tmux_session is canonical ID unconditionally. Code quality sweep: removed dead code, cheap uuid?, ghost detection without template Registry lookups.

subject: Fix shutdown ghost: session aliases + tombstones in EventBuffer
description: After Shutdown, SessionEnd hook fires with empty TMUX_SESSION (tmux dead), creating ghost under raw UUID. Fix: (1) session alias ETS caches UUID->tmux mappings, (2) tombstone_session/1 blocks events for 30s post-shutdown, (3) shutdown preserves events (tombstone not purge) so agents stay visible as ended.

subject: Signal nervous system: migrate all PubSub to Ichor.Signal
description: Migrated 52+ Phoenix.PubSub.broadcast calls across 27+ files to Ichor.Signal.emit. Rewrote all subscribers to match %Signal.Payload{}. Buffer rewritten Signal-only. DashboardInfoHandlers/GatewayHandlers fully rewritten. Catalog expanded to 45+ signals, 10 categories. Debounced recompute added.
notes: Only remaining PubSub.broadcast: signal.ex internals (4), buffer.ex stream:feed (1), channels.ex transport (4). All intentional.

subject: AliasUsage: fleet core modules
description: Fix AliasUsage credo violations. Add alias declarations at module top, use short module names throughout. Files: fleet/agent.ex (13 issues), fleet/fleet_supervisor.ex (3), fleet/team.ex (3), fleet/team_supervisor.ex (1). Total: 20 AliasUsage issues.
goal: All 4 files pass mix credo --strict with zero AliasUsage violations
done_when: mix credo --strict lib/ichor/fleet/agent.ex lib/ichor/fleet/fleet_supervisor.ex lib/ichor/fleet/team.ex lib/ichor/fleet/team_supervisor.ex && mix compile --warnings-as-errors

subject: AliasUsage: fleet process/signal/heartbeat files
description: Fix AliasUsage credo violations. Files: fleet/agent_process.ex (2 issues), fleet/agent_process/delivery.ex (4), signal/buffer.ex (1), signal/event.ex (1), heartbeat.ex (1). Total: 9 AliasUsage issues.
goal: All 5 files pass mix credo --strict with zero AliasUsage violations

description: Fix AliasUsage credo violations. Files: dashboard_session_control_handlers.ex (6 issues), dashboard_tmux_handlers.ex (4), dashboard_archon_handlers.ex (1), dashboard_info_handlers.ex (1). Total: 12 AliasUsage issues.
goal: All 4 files pass mix credo --strict with zero AliasUsage violations
notes: Fixed 12 AliasUsage violations across 4 files. Added aliases: AgentRegistry, AgentEntry, AgentProcess, FleetSupervisor, TeamSupervisor in session_control_handlers; AgentRegistry in tmux_handlers; Archon.Chat in archon_handlers; HITLRelay in info_handlers.

subject: AliasUsage: dashboard message/notification helpers
description: Fix AliasUsage credo violations. Files: dashboard_message_helpers.ex (1 issue), dashboard_notification_handlers.ex (1). Total: 2 AliasUsage issues.
goal: Both files pass mix credo --strict with zero AliasUsage violations

subject: ModuleDoc: ichor domain modules
description: Add @moduledoc to modules missing it. Files: ichor/activity.ex, ichor/costs.ex, ichor/costs/token_usage.ex, ichor/events.ex, ichor/events/event.ex, ichor/events/session.ex, ichor/fleet.ex. Use false for domain wrapper modules (no public API), or a brief description for real modules.

Files: components/fleet_command_components.ex, forensic_components.ex, god_mode_components.ex, registry_components.ex, scheduler_components.ex, session_cluster_components.ex, team_tmux_components.ex. Use @moduledoc false for component modules that don't need public docs.

notes: COMPLETE. 7 new modules under lib/ichor/signals/. 42 consumer files renamed. Old files moved to tmp/trash/signal/. mix compile --warnings-as-errors CLEAN (225 files). mix credo --strict 0 issues.

subject: Misc: ParenthesesOnZeroArityDefs + CondStatements
description: Fix misc credo issues. (1) lib/ichor/application.ex: ParenthesesOnZeroArityDefs - remove parens from zero-arity function defs. (2) lib/ichor_web/components/feed/session_group.ex: CondStatements - replace single-condition cond with if.
goal: Both files pass mix credo --strict

Break complex functions with high cyclomatic complexity into smaller focused functions. Fix ONLY credo issues - no other refactoring.

subject: Nesting: gateway/tmux.ex + output_capture.ex + tmux_discovery.ex + quality_gate.ex + task_manager.ex + causal_dag.ex
description: Fix Nesting (and Apply for causal_dag) credo violations. subject: Migrate Ichor.Signal -> Ichor.Signals per signals.md convention
description: Rename and restructure the Signal nervous system. Key changes: (1) Namespace rename Ichor.Signal -> Ichor.Signals across ~30 files. (2) New modules: Signals.Bus (sole PubSub interface), Signals.Topics (topic string builder), Signals.FromAsh (Ash notification adapter), Signals.Message (replaces Payload). (3) API change: emit/2 -> publish/1 with new_message/7. (4) Signal identity: atom name -> kind+domain+resource+action tuple. (5) Remove Signal.Catalog (absorbed into domain identity). See HANDOFF.md for file mapping and subscriber list.
goal: Signals namespace matches signals.md architecture spec, enabling richer event envelope and Ash-native integration
acceptance_criteria: Ichor.Signal module removed or aliased to Ichor.Signals
Dashboard still receives all signals correctly
notes: COMPLETE. 7 new modules under lib/ichor/signals/. 42 consumer files renamed. Old files moved to tmp/trash/signal/. mix compile --warnings-as-errors CLEAN (225 files). mix credo --strict 0 issues.

subject: Phase 1: GraphMemory MCP resource
description: Create Ichor.AgentTools.GraphMemory Ash resource with 3 actions: graph_search, graph_remember, graph_query. Wire into AgentTools domain. Follows pattern from agent_tools/memory.ex. Calls MemoriesClient HTTP. Space default: project:ichor:fleet for search, project:ichor:agent:{session_id} for writes.
goal: Fleet agents can read/write the Memories knowledge graph via MCP tools
acceptance_criteria: GraphMemory resource compiles with zero warnings
graph_search returns results from Memories API
graph_remember ingests episode to correct space

subject: Phase 1: Graph memory overlay instructions
description: Add graph_memory_section/1 to InstructionOverlay.generate/1. Included for builder/lead/reviewer roles. Instructs agents to search graph before work and remember outcomes after.
goal: Spawned agents know they have graph memory tools and how to use them
acceptance_criteria: Section appears in generated overlay for builder role
Section does NOT appear for scout role
Instructions include graph_search before work and graph_remember after

subject: Phase 2: MemoriesClient Thread API
description: Extend MemoriesClient with 4 Thread API functions: create_thread/2, add_thread_message/3, thread_context/2, end_thread/1. Uses existing post/2 helper. Endpoints: POST /api/threads, POST /api/threads/:id/messages, GET /api/threads/:id/context, POST /api/threads/:id/end.
goal: MemoriesClient can manage Memories threads for session continuity

subject: Phase 2: ThreadRegistry ETS + GraphThread resource
description: Create ThreadRegistry (ETS-backed, pure functions, maps session_id->thread_id). Create GraphThread Ash resource with 3 actions: start_thread, write_outcome, get_context. ETS table created in application.ex. Wire into AgentTools domain.
goal: Agent sessions map to Memories threads for mission continuity
acceptance_criteria: ThreadRegistry ETS table created at boot
start_thread creates or resumes a thread
write_outcome closes thread and ingests to fleet space

subject: Phase 2: Thread cleanup on agent terminate
description: In AgentProcess.terminate/2, add async thread cleanup guarded by MemoriesBridge.enabled?/0. Uses Task.Supervisor to end thread and delete from ThreadRegistry. Update InstructionOverlay with thread protocol.
goal: Threads are always closed when agents die, even abnormally
acceptance_criteria: terminate/2 ends thread via TaskSupervisor async

subject: Phase 3: Role-specific MemoryPacket builder
description: Create Ichor.Fleet.MemoryPacket pure function module. build/3 dispatches on capability to role-specific graph searches. Builder: decisions+failures. Lead: blockers+team history. Reviewer: gate failures. Scout: prior explorations. 3-second Task.yield timeout. Returns formatted text or empty string.
goal: Agents receive role-tailored graph context at spawn time
acceptance_criteria: build/3 returns {:ok, text} with relevant context
3-second timeout, degrades to empty on failure

subject: Phase 3: Inject memory packet at spawn
description: In AgentSpawner.spawn_local/1, after InstructionOverlay.write_session_files, call MemoryPacket.build and append Prior Knowledge section to overlay file. Guarded by MemoriesBridge.enabled?/0. 3-second timeout, spawn proceeds without packet on failure.
goal: Every spawned agent starts with relevant graph context already in its overlay
acceptance_criteria: Prior Knowledge section appears in overlay when Memories configured
Spawn succeeds without delay when Memories unconfigured

subject: Consolidate to single Ichor.Registry
description: Replace Fleet.ProcessRegistry, Fleet.TeamRegistry, Mes.Registry, Gateway.AgentRegistry with ONE Ichor.Registry using compound keys {:agent,id}, {:team,name}, {:run,id}. User directive: 1 registry for entire ICHOR.
goal: All BEAM processes register in one place. MES agents visible in dashboard.
notes: Task 5 complete: All consumers migrated from ETS AgentRegistry to AgentProcess API. 23 files updated. Router resolve_channel moved inline. Agent lifecycle: terminate() no longer needs explicit remove (auto-deregisters on process exit). Heartbeat purge_stale removed (no-op). mix compile --warnings-as-errors CLEAN.

subject: Consolidate 3 registries into single Ichor.Registry
description: Replaced Fleet.ProcessRegistry, Fleet.TeamRegistry, and Mes.Registry with single Ichor.Registry using compound keys: {:agent, id}, {:team, name}, {:run, id}. Added missing signals :mes_agent_stopped and :mes_agent_tmux_gone to Catalog. Fixed /simplify issues: duplicate short_id/maybe_put helpers, scheduler N+1.
notes: Zero references to old registry names remain. Gateway.AgentRegistry ETS kept (display cache, 50 refs, separate effort).

subject: Task 6: Delete Gateway.AgentRegistry ETS GenServer
description: Now that all consumers have been migrated to AgentProcess API (Task 5), delete lib/ichor/gateway/agent_registry.ex and its submodules (event_handler.ex, identity_merge.ex, team_sync.ex, sweep.ex). Keep agent_entry.ex (pure utilities used by many files). Remove from gateway_supervisor.ex supervision tree. Remove from application supervision.
goal: Single source of truth: Ichor.Registry only. Gateway.AgentRegistry ETS table gone.
done_when: mix compile --warnings-as-errors && grep -r AgentRegistry lib/ --include=*.ex -l | grep -v agent_entry
notes: Task 6 complete: agent_registry.ex + 4 submodules moved to trash. agent_entry.ex kept. gateway_supervisor.ex updated (removed AgentRegistry child, strategy: one_for_one). mix compile --warnings-as-errors CLEAN.

subject: Genesis domain: Node resource
description: Create Ichor.Genesis Ash domain with Node resource (SQLite). Fields: title, description, brief, stakeholders, constraints, status enum (discover/define/build/complete). Include migration.
goal: Node resource compiles and migrates
notes: Genesis domain + Node resource created. Manual migration (ash.codegen snapshot issues). Verified with list_all query.

subject: Genesis domain: ADR resource
description: ADR resource with code, title, status (pending/proposed/accepted/rejected), content, research_complete, parent_code, related_adr_codes. belongs_to Node.
goal: ADR resource with CRUD actions

subject: Genesis domain: Feature + UseCase resources
description: Feature: code, title, content, adr_codes array. UseCase: code, title, content, feature_code. Both belong_to Node.
goal: Feature and UseCase resources with CRUD

subject: Genesis domain: Checkpoint + Conversation resources
description: Checkpoint: title, mode (discover/define/build), content, summary. Conversation: title, mode, content, participants. Both belong_to Node.
goal: Checkpoint and Conversation resources with CRUD

subject: Genesis domain: Phase/Section/Task/Subtask resources
description: Phase: number, title, goals, status, governed_by. Section: number, title, goal, belongs_to Phase. Task: number, title, governed_by, parent_uc, status, belongs_to Section. Subtask: number, title, goal, allowed_files, blocked_by, steps, done_when, status, owner, belongs_to Task.
goal: Mode C roadmap hierarchy in SQLite

subject: MES Project: genesis_node_id FK
description: Add genesis_node_id field to Ichor.Mes.Project linking PROPOSED projects to their Genesis Node.
goal: Project links to Node

subject: MCP tools: Genesis artifact CRUD
description: Extend existing MCP server with create_genesis_node, create_adr, update_adr, list_adrs, create_feature, list_features, create_use_case, list_use_cases, create_conversation, list_conversations, create_checkpoint, gate_check tools.
goal: Teams can write Genesis artifacts via MCP

subject: MCP tools: Mode C roadmap tools
description: Add create_phase, create_task, create_subtask, list_phases MCP tools for Mode C agents.
goal: Mode C agents can write roadmap hierarchy

subject: Component split: extract MES sub-components
description: Split mes_components.ex into: mes_feed_components.ex (feed/feed_row/feed_header), mes_detail_components.ex (project_detail), mes_status_components.ex (status_badge/action_button/scheduler_status), mes_section_components.ex (detail_section/tag_list/mono_block). Orchestrator delegates.
goal: MES components modular and under 200 lines each

subject: UI: Genesis panel component
description: mes_genesis_components.ex: Mode A/B/C buttons, team selector (auto-spawn or pick existing), artifact summary (ADR/Feature/UC/Conversation counts, Checkpoint timeline). Wire into detail panel.
goal: Mode actions and artifact summary visible on PROPOSED projects

subject: UI: Gate check component + handler
description: mes_gate_components.ex: gate_report/1 displays readiness report. Handler spawns gate review team, collects report via send_message.
goal: Gate Check button spawns team and displays report

subject: Mode dispatch: team spawning + prompts
description: Handler for mes_start_mode event. Creates Genesis Node from Project brief if needed. Auto-spawns Workshop team with mode-specific agent presets and prompts, or assigns to existing team. Agents get scoped MCP tool lists.
goal: Clicking Mode A/B/C spawns a team that executes the mode

subject: DAG generator: Subtask hierarchy to tasks.jsonl
description: Convert Genesis Subtask hierarchy to tasks.jsonl format with blocked_by chains. Generate DAG button in UI triggers conversion.
goal: Mode C output becomes executable DAG
